company.name: UMANG
company.tagline: Engineering World-Class Infrastructure — Water Supply, Roads, Buildings, WTP & STP

hero.title: Engineering the massive infrastructure nations rely on
hero.text: For nearly two decades, Umang Infrastructure has executed landmark civil, environmental, and highway projects. From major Water Treatment Plants (WTP) and Sewage Treatment Plants (STP) to heavy road networks and public buildings, we build for world-class excellence.

hero.title: Lifesaving water networks engineered to perfection
hero.text: Delivering complete end-to-end water supply grids, overhead concrete reservoirs, and state-of-the-art WTP and STP facilities that protect communities and power industrial growth.

hero.title: Constructing the structural foundations of modern society
hero.text: With an uncompromising commitment to structural integrity and strict government deadlines, we construct heavy road corridors, expressways, and institutional building complexes built to stand for generations.

about.heading: Two decades of building landmark civil & environmental infrastructure
about.body: Established in 2006 as premier government and public sector contractors, Umang Infrastructure has grown into an engineering powerhouse headquartered in Purnia, Bihar. Driven by our ambition to become one of the biggest infrastructure contractors globally, we deliver turnkey projects across five core pillars: Water Supply Systems, Building Construction, Road & Highway Engineering, Water Treatment Plants (WTP), and Sewage Treatment Plants (STP).
points: Premier government & public sector infrastructure contractors
Turnkey Water Supply & District Distribution Grids
Advanced Water Treatment Plants (WTP) & Sewage Treatment Plants (STP)
Landmark Government & Commercial Building Complex Construction
Uncompromising reinforced execution delivered on strict deadlines

services.title: Water Supply Grids
services.text: District and municipal water supply networks, transmission pipelines, and overhead concrete reservoirs engineered for massive scale.

services.title: WTP & STP Facilities
services.text: Turnkey construction of state-of-the-art Water Treatment Plants (WTP) and Sewage Treatment Plants (STP) with advanced environmental controls.

services.title: Roads & Highways
services.text: Heavy-duty highway paving, expressway corridors, bridge approaches, and durable road infrastructure engineered for heavy traffic.

services.title: Building Construction
services.text: Structural engineering and execution of government, institutional, residential, and commercial building complexes.

services.title: Government Contracting
services.text: Trusted execution of large-scale public sector, state, and municipal contracts with rigorous financial and operational accountability.

services.title: Global Quality Standards
services.text: Exacting ISO-grade reinforced construction methodologies, modern equipment, and a 100% on-time completion commitment.

team.name: Anand Mohan Mishra
team.image: img/team/03 - Anand Mohan Mishra - Manager, Operations.jpg

process.intro: A rigorous, accountable methodology designed for complex government and municipal infrastructure works.

steps.title: Survey & Feasibility
steps.text: Comprehensive geological, hydrological, and traffic assessments to define an optimized, executable project blueprint.

steps.title: Structural Engineering
steps.text: Advanced CAD and structural modeling for WTP/STP facilities, heavy road foundations, and institutional buildings.

steps.title: Heavy Construction
steps.text: Exacting on-site execution utilizing modern machinery, reinforced concrete standards, and rigorous safety protocols.

steps.title: Commissioning & Handover
steps.text: Multi-stage stress testing, environmental compliance verification, and seamless handover to government authorities.

items.q: What core sectors does Umang Infrastructure operate in?
items.a: We operate across five major infrastructure sectors: Water Supply Systems, Water Treatment Plants (WTP), Sewage Treatment Plants (STP), Road & Highway Engineering, and Public/Commercial Building Construction.

items.q: Do you undertake major government and public sector tenders?
items.a: Yes. As established government contractors since 2006, we specialize in turnkey execution of municipal, state, and national infrastructure contracts with full compliance and financial reliability.

items.q: What is Umang Infrastructure's long-term vision?
items.a: Our goal is to expand our footprint from being regional leaders to becoming one of the premier, global-scale infrastructure contractors in the world, renowned for quality and on-time delivery.

items.q: How do you ensure structural durability in WTP, STP, and Road projects?
items.a: We adhere to strict ISO-grade engineering standards, high-grade reinforced concrete specifications, and multi-stage quality checks overseen by senior civil engineers.

items.q: How can government departments or joint-venture partners contact you?
items.a: You can reach our executive project office via the contact form on this website or by emailing ui@umanginfra.com with your proposal or tender requirements.

news.intro: Latest updates, project commissioning, and milestones from our job sites across the region.

posts.title: New 50 MLD Water Treatment Plant goes live
posts.text: Our engineering team successfully commissioned a major WTP facility, supplying treated water to over 200,000 residents.

posts.title: Completion of Highway 54 arterial link
posts.text: Handed over a heavy-duty reinforced road corridor ahead of schedule, enhancing regional commercial transit.

posts.text: Selected for a comprehensive environmental infrastructure project involving modern sewage treatment and recycling.

impact.heading: Infrastructure that transforms communities and economies.
impact.body: We believe that world-class infrastructure — whether safe water, clean environmental treatment, durable roads, or public buildings — is the cornerstone of human progress and national development.

items.title: Lifesaving Water Grids
items.text: Connecting under-served regions to clean, uninterrupted drinking water through robust pipeline and tower networks.

items.title: Environmental Protection
items.text: Safeguarding rivers and ecosystems through advanced Sewage Treatment Plants (STP) and recycling systems.

items.title: Economic Connectivity
items.text: Building durable road corridors and public buildings that empower trade, governance, and community mobility.

careers.intro: We are seeking ambitious civil engineers, project managers, and site supervisors who want to build world-class infrastructure. Join a fast-growing government contractor with global aspirations.

jobs.title: Senior Civil Engineer (WTP & STP)
jobs.desc: Lead on-site execution and structural quality control for municipal Water Treatment and Sewage Treatment plant projects.

jobs.title: Project Manager (Roads & Highways)
jobs.desc: Manage end-to-end delivery of highway and road construction contracts from surveying to final government handover.

jobs.title: Structural Engineer (Buildings & Towers)
jobs.desc: Oversee structural CAD, reinforced concrete compliance, and site engineering for commercial and public buildings.
